title: tephrosia crocea
intro: Tephrosia crocea, also known as Yellow Leaf, is a tropical plant species native to Madagascar and parts of Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia crocea include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. In herbal preparations, Tephrosia crocea is often used in the form of a tea or decoction, and it can also be found in some traditional remedies and supplements.
